templates.text: This zone is pretty chill once you know the spawn patterns.
I love this zone. Great XP and the mobs aren't too bad.
Careful around here, the aggro range is huge.
Anyone else farming here? Don't want to steal your mobs.
The drops here are decent if you know what to farm.
Port Azure is always busy. Love the hub feel.
Just hit up the AH in Port Azure. Prices are wild today.
Port Azure has the best vendors. Stock up before heading out.
Hidden Hills is great for leveling if you group up.
Watch out for the patrols in Hidden Hills, they can sneak up on you.
Faerie's Brake gives me the creeps. The forest is so dense.
The fae creatures in Faerie's Brake drop some unique stuff.
Vitheo's Watch has an amazing view from the top.
Fernalla's Revival Plains is good for mid-level grinding.
The portal events in Fernalla's Revival Plains are insane. So much chaos.
Silkengrass Meadowlands is so open. Easy to pull mobs without adds.
Fallen Braxonia is rough. Bring a group.
Loomingwood is dark but the XP is solid.
Soluna's Landing has this whole divine vibe. Really cool lore.
The Bone Pits are full of undead. Bring your anti-undead gear.
Elderstone Mines is a solid dungeon. Good group content down there.
Blacksalt Strand is windy as heck but the beach views are nice.
Don't go to Ripper's Keep solo unless you're way overleveled.
The elevation in Prielian Cascade messes with combat. Watch your positioning.
Abyssal Lake is creepy. Something about the water just feels wrong.
Remember Island Tomb? That's where we all started. Good times.
Shivering Step is freezing. The ice mobs hit hard too.
Azynthi's Garden is actually kind of peaceful for how dangerous it is.
Malaroth's Nesting Grounds is end-game territory. Do not go unprepared.
The Braxonian Desert is brutal. Heat, sand, and nasty mobs.
The Blight is seriously messed up. Everything is corrupted.
Old Krakengard has sea monsters. Actual sea monsters. Wild.
The Jaws of Sivakaya is where things get real. Endgame content.
Blooming Sepulcher is this weird mix of flowers and undead. Eerie.
Windwashed Pass is a good connector zone. Not too dangerous.
Rottenfoot is nasty. Swamp mobs, undead, all of it.
The Lost Cellar under Port Azure has some really good loot if you can handle it.
Have you explored {zone} yet? It's worth checking out.
I just came from {zone}. Decent loot over there.
Watch out in this area, mobs respawn fast.
It's a long run to get here from Port Azure. Worth it though.
This zone is way better with a group. Wanna party up?
I've been soloing here all day. Not bad for XP.
You gotta admit, this zone looks amazing.
I keep getting lost in here. The layout is confusing.
Good camp spot right here. Mobs come to you.
There's a named mob around here somewhere. Keep an eye out.
What level range is this zone? I want to make sure I'm not too low.
Spawns are up in the north section if you're looking.
Duskenlight Coast has great atmosphere at sunset. Beautiful zone.
Getting to Bellwain Island is the hard part. Once you're there it's cool.
The Mysterious Portal zone is... weird. Different from anything else.
Rockshade Hold is a good spot if you like tight corridor fights.
Secluded Sanctuary is actually really peaceful. Nice break from grinding.
Reliquary Hall has some serious loot. Guardians hit like trucks though.
Underspine Hollow is deep. Bring torches and potions.
Willowwatch Ridge has this melancholic feel to it. Beautiful but sad.
Stowaway's Step has smuggler vibes. Love the lore here.
Vitheo's Rest is advanced content. Make sure you're geared up.
This might be my favorite zone in the whole game.
Zone is pretty crowded today. Might want to try another area.
Nobody else here? Great, more mobs for me.
I remember my first time here. Got wrecked instantly. Good memories.
This zone is a good stepping stone to the next tier.
There are some solid quests in this zone. Have you checked with the NPCs?
The spawn rate here is great for grinding. Pull fast, kill fast.
I've mapped out most of this zone. Ask if you need directions.
Be careful near the edges of the zone. Mobs level up quick over there.
First time in this zone. Any tips?
This place is gorgeous. Best art in the game.
The mobs here con even so it's decent XP. No huge risk.
I farm this zone whenever I need gold. Reliable income.
This zone has a secret area. Won't spoil it, but explore carefully.
Zone events pop up randomly here. Stay alert.
Just hit zone boundary. Gonna switch to the next area.
This zone looks different at night. Way creepier.
Raining again. The weather effects in this zone are cool though.
This zone is way better than {zone} for our level range.
I hate this zone. The mobs are annoying and the layout is confusing.
You should try this zone out. It's great for your level.
If you want better XP, try moving to a higher level zone.
Dungeons are always better with a group. Less downtime.
The deeper you go in this dungeon, the tougher it gets. Worth it though.
I prefer outdoor zones. More room to maneuver.
Long run from the last zone but totally worth it.
This spot feels safe enough to go AFK for a sec.
The boss in this zone drops really good gear. Worth camping.
This zone connects to like three others. Good hub area.
I think this zone is about level 10 to 20 range. Check your map.
Bring fire resist gear to Shivering Step. Trust me on this.
Pro tip: stick to the edges and work your way in.
Don't fight near the zone line. Mobs can chain from both sides.
Watch the patrol paths. They overlap near the center.
This zone has good mining spots if you're into crafting.
The lore behind this zone is actually really interesting. The NPCs have dialog about it.
This is endgame territory. You need to be max level and geared.
I'm way overleveled for this zone. Everything dies in one hit.
The mobs here are way higher than me. Playing dangerous.
Respawn timer here is fast. No downtime between pulls.
This would be a great zone for PvP if the game had it. So many chokepoints.
Port Azure never gets old. Always someone hanging out, always something to do.
Hidden Hills was my first real zone after the tutorial. Lots of memories here.
Loomingwood has some tough patrollers. Watch the tree line.
Braxonian Desert mobs are spread out but they hit hard. Don't pull multiples.
The ruins in Fallen Braxonia tell a sad story. This was once a great civilization.
Soluna's Landing feels sacred somehow. Like something important happened here.
If you're heading to Malaroth's Nesting Grounds, bring your best gear and a full group.
The Bone Pits are great for Paladin leveling. All the undead mobs.
The mobs on Duskenlight Coast are deceptively tough. Don't let the scenery fool you.
The Blight is where I go when I want a challenge. Everything there wants you dead.
Old Krakengard has amazing loot drops. The sea monsters are worth fighting.
Azynthi's Garden has some of the most unique mobs in the game. Really creative designs.
Vitheo's Watch is a great mid-level zone. Good XP, nice views.
Fernalla's Revival Plains is crawling with adventurers. Popular zone for good reason.
Elderstone Mines gets tighter the deeper you go. Claustrophobic dungeon for sure.
Blacksalt Strand has some rare spawns along the shore. Worth patrolling.
Ripper's Keep has some of the best drops in the game. Worth the risk.
Jaws of Sivakaya is no joke. Even max level characters can get overwhelmed.
The hidden paths in Stowaway's Step are worth finding. Good shortcuts.
